frame-radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the video component for the frame corners: M3 ships no video component (verified 2026-07-17), so the frame adopts md.sys.shape.corner.medium (12dp) through the material3 radius scale — the ki-card media shape precedent (theme-author decision, spec Assumptions).

scrim-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the video component for the overlay scrim: transparent — M3 surfaces are flat and the MarsUI glass halo is disabled; the play container carries the whole affordance (theme-author decision).

scrim-padding.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the video component for the scrim clearance: zero — with the halo disabled the play control collapses to its 56dp container, still above the 48dp M3 touch target (theme-author decision).

play-radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the video component for the play container shape: M3 shape Round, the same decision as the ki-icon-button material3 override.

play-bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the video component for the play container surface: the filled icon button container role (md.sys.color.primary), the closest M3 pattern named by the spec's design-source analysis — the -bg/-fg pair is swept by the contrast gate (FR-008).

play-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the video component for the play glyph: on-primary over the filled container, inherited via currentColor (filled icon button pairing).

play-border-color.$description: Material 3 color used by the video component for the play container border: none — the MarsUI glass bevel is disabled (ki-icon-button material3 precedent).

play-shadow.$description: value used by the video component for the play container effects under Material 3: flat — the MarsUI glass pair (e1 drop + inner white highlight) is disabled (ki-icon-button material3 precedent).
